# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest published version of each plugin in this marketplace is supported with security fixes. Plugin versions live in `plugins/<plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you believe you have found a security issue in `acss-kit`, `acss-utilities`, or any of the maintainer scripts in this repository, **do not open a public issue or pull request**.

Instead, report it privately via [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/shawn-sandy/agentic-acss-plugins/security/advisories/new). Include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce (a minimal failing example is ideal)
- The affected plugin and version (`plugins/<plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json#version`)
- Any suggested mitigation, if you have one

You will receive an acknowledgement within a reasonable time. Once the issue is confirmed, a fix will land on the default branch and ship in the next plugin version, with credit in the changelog if you would like it.

## Scope

In scope:

- Code generated by the plugins' slash commands (`/kit-add`, `/theme-create`, `/utility-add`, etc.)
- The Python scripts under `plugins/*/scripts/` and `tests/`
- The plugin manifests and marketplace configuration

Out of scope:

- Vulnerabilities in upstream dependencies (`@fpkit/acss`, `sass`, `tinycss2`, etc.) — please report those to their respective projects
- Issues in Claude Code itself — report to <https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code>
